holdings.infoBox: PBUS is an equity ETF with a total of 529 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.42%, Apple at 6.69%, Microsoft at 4.32%, Amazon.com at 3.61%, and Alphabet at 3.28%.

overview.description: The Invesco MSCI USA ETF (PBUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA index. The fund tracks a market-cap-selected and -weighted index of mid and large-cap US stocks. PBUS was launched on Sep 22, 2017 and is issued by Invesco.
